title: Kaboom
description: Kaboom! This mod adds stuff related to Explosives such as Bombs and Dynamite
body:
![Kaboom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c44de2e448aeb7d90192e7c486310192f6c97b97.png)
 **KABOOM! THIS MOD EVERYTHING RELATED TO EXPLOSIVES**

 This mod currently has 5 different bombs
 Types of Bomb
- Basic Bomb: Normal Power
- Big Bomb: Bigger Explosion
- Mega Bomb: The Big One
- Frag Bomb: Explosion, No Destruction
- Dynamite: Timed Explosion
![Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe12767acb0b78987f3bdf33b0fabe8d57457cf1.png)

CONTACT kaweomods@gmail.com FOR ANY SUGGESTIONS OR BUG REPORTS.
